stemHtml: In cruise, TCAS TA from traffic below climbing toward you. Per ICAO Doc 8168, you should...

options.a: Manoeuvre to avoid based on the TA.
options.b: Manoeuvre if you see the traffic.
options.c: Inform ATC and manoeuvre unless it jeopardises safety.
options.d: Use all available info and prepare for action if an RA follows.
